response.overview: Ta Dutdot Mo Kalilibnusan follows Duds, a once-promising painter who now survives on small painting jobs to make ends meet. He lives a quiet but difficult life with his devoted wife, Feling, whose sacrifices keep their household afloat. As his health declines and his hands begin to tremble, Duds struggles with a growing creative block and withdraws from the people around him.
response.title: Your Feathers, So Beautiful
